response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience, deep technical craftsmanship, and exposure to distributed systems and open-source tooling, but lacks clear evidence of building enterprise-scale experimentation or growth platforms with AI-first telemetry, feature flagging, or cross-team measurement systems — key requirements for the role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, C++, and Python-adjacent languages
Proven track record in building scalable infrastructure (e.g., real-time microservices, Kubernetes-deployed platforms)
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership via workshops, tooling, and community initiatives
concerns: No explicit experience with experimentation frameworks, feature flighting, or guardrails for AI-driven growth systems
Career gap since Oct 2025 raises questions about recent hands-on engineering velocity
Lacks demonstrable impact on cross-team measurement platforms or AI-augmented engineering velocity at scale
